scoring_boundary.zh: 本文件只补充市场、客户、工况和实机资料，不改变现有参数、配置及六类工况评分。
scoring_boundary.en: This dataset supplements market, customer, application and field information only. It does not change the existing specification, equipment or six-condition scores.

customer_mix_note.zh: PPT明确列出的四类客户合计90%，剩余10%未在源页说明，不作推断。
customer_mix_note.en: The four customer groups explicitly listed in the source total 90%. The remaining 10% is not described and is not inferred.

purchase_logic.zh: 皮卡与14K拖车组合下的运输余量
purchase_logic.en: Payload margin with a pickup and 14K trailer

purchase_logic.zh: 非专业机手的操控易用性与稳定性
purchase_logic.en: Ease of use and stability for non-professional operators

purchase_logic.zh: 铲斗、拇指钳、破碎锤和高流量属具覆盖
purchase_logic.en: Coverage for buckets, thumb, breaker and high-flow attachments

purchase_logic.zh: 可靠性、维修便利性、舒适性与残值
purchase_logic.en: Reliability, serviceability, comfort and residual value

finding.zh: XCMG重量偏高，典型附件组合会进一步压缩拖车载荷余量。
finding.en: XCMG is heavier, and a representative attachment package further reduces trailer payload margin.

finding.zh: XCMG较KX033-4宽190 mm，受限场地与拖车布置灵活性较弱。
finding.en: XCMG is 190 mm wider than the KX033-4, reducing flexibility in confined sites and trailer packaging.

finding.zh: XCMG为五款样机中最长，需结合快换、铲斗和拖车甲板重新核算总包络。
finding.en: XCMG is the longest of the five machines and requires a complete package review with coupler, bucket and trailer deck.

finding.zh: XCMG较KX033-4浅150 mm，深沟和基础开挖能力存在明确差距。
finding.en: XCMG is 150 mm shallower than the KX033-4, creating a documented gap in deep trench and foundation work.

finding.zh: XCMG为源页五款产品最高，是沟槽和硬土开挖的纸面优势。
finding.en: XCMG is highest among the five products in the source, a paper advantage for trenching and firm-soil excavation.

finding.zh: XCMG较KX033-4低7.6 kN，重挖与破碎前置清料能力弱于标杆。
finding.en: XCMG is 7.6 kN below the KX033-4, reducing paper capability for heavy excavation and pre-breaker material handling.

finding.zh: 在源页可比数据中XCMG最高，但应核对推土铲位置、回转方向和测试口径。
finding.en: XCMG is highest among the comparable source values, but blade position, lifting direction and test basis require verification.

finding.zh: XCMG高速档较久保田低1.0 km/h，影响场内转场和租赁通用性。
finding.en: XCMG high range is 1.0 km/h below Kubota, affecting jobsite relocation and rental versatility.

finding.zh: XCMG较久保田低20 L/min，开带机、割草机等高流量属具适配受限。
finding.en: XCMG is 20 L/min below Kubota, limiting compatibility with higher-flow brush cutters and mowers.

comparison.zh: 优于源页久保田与三一配置
comparison.en: Stronger provision than the source Kubota and SANY configurations

comparison.zh: 扩大作业范围，但KX033-4可选伸缩工装
comparison.en: Extends working range, while KX033-4 offers telescopic equipment

comparison.zh: 久保田配置，影响破碎锤背压与油泄管理
comparison.en: Listed on Kubota; relevant to breaker back pressure and case-drain management

comparison.zh: 久保田覆盖短尾、常规尾与低配常规尾
comparison.en: Kubota spans short-tail, conventional-tail and lower-spec conventional-tail
